title: Forsetti Agentic Edition Task Contract
description: Schema for task contracts in the Forsetti Agentic Edition governance workflow.

task_id.description: Unique task identifier following the FAE naming convention.

date.description: Date the task contract was created.

initiating_request.description: The original request or trigger that initiated this task.

acting_role.description: The role responsible for executing the task.

reviewer_role.description: The role responsible for reviewing the task output.

change_class.description: Classification of the change being made.

approval_class.description: Level of approval required for this task.

objective.description: Clear statement of what the task aims to achieve.

business_reason.description: Justification for why this task is necessary.

in_scope.description: List of items explicitly within the scope of this task.

out_of_scope.description: List of items explicitly excluded from the scope of this task.

required_outputs.description: Deliverables that must be produced by this task.

documentation_impact.description: Flags indicating which documentation areas are affected.

readme_update.description: Whether the README requires an update.

wiki_update.description: Whether the wiki requires an update.

glossary_update.description: Whether the glossary requires an update.

release_impact.description: The expected impact on the project version.

validation_requirements.description: Checks and validations that must pass before the task is complete.

risks_constraints.description: Known risks or constraints associated with this task.

escalation_triggers.description: Conditions that should trigger escalation to a higher authority.

definition_of_done.description: Criteria that must all be satisfied for the task to be considered complete.

completion_summary_requirements.description: Items that must be included in the task completion summary.
